summary: Implemented comprehensive unit tests for the Ouroboros Redux slice and fixed a critical syntax error in the CanvasEngine component that was blocking test execution.

files.description: New test file covering all reducers in the ouroborosSlice (startAuthSequence, stopAuthSequence, setAREPayload, initializeRoot, triggerError, clearError).
Fixed syntax errors in forEach loops and correctly accessed fabricObjectsMapRef.current to resolve build failures detected during full test run.
